name: Columbus McKinnon Corporation
description: Columbus McKinnon Corporation is a leading worldwide designer, manufacturer, and marketer of intelligent motion solutions, material handling systems, and services. The company's products include hoists, cranes, actuators, rigging tools, and digital power control systems designed to safely and efficiently lift, position, and secure materials. Serving a wide range of industries such as manufacturing, power generation, transportation, and logistics, Columbus McKinnon focuses on improving safety and productivity through advanced technology and high-quality engineering.
